justification.where: Azure Container Registry (tngomgmtacr) — resource group tngomgmt
justification.why: CCN round-13.1 plugin enrichment: activate Obsidian skill pack (ArtemXTech/personal-os-skills @ 0c0cf5a0), reclassify GitNexus as operator-internal V1.5+ (not a third-party plugin). Image carries refreshed seed baseline.
justification.who: CCN implementer agent under standing operator authorization (Nexus idea: acr-multi-arch-push-standing-operator-authorization-for-ccn, captured 2026-04-19)
justification.how_helps: Publishes multi-arch CCN worker image so operator and tenant deployments pull a consistent baseline with Obsidian activated; unblocks round-13 closeout and future plugin-triggered rebuilds.
justification.expected_return: Zero incremental revenue — infra plumbing. Keeps CI + deploy parity valid so downstream tenant onboarding (V1) stays unblocked.
